invite_email_note: The recipient accepts the invite from their Triplanio inbox
invite_link_note: Anyone who opens the link lands on the accept page with the role pre-selected
invite_more_desc: Send an invite by e-mail. The recipient sees the trip after signing up.
invitee_note: The recipient accepts the invite from their Triplanio inbox
join_error_blocked: You were removed from this trip. Ask the owner to invite you again to rejoin.
join_error_expired: This invite link has expired. Ask for a new one
join_error_invalid: This invite link is not valid
join_invited: You have been invited to a trip
join_signin_lede: Sign in or create a Triplanio account to land right in the shared trip.
join_signin_prompt: Sign in to join this trip
offline_name_hint: no account, just shown in participants
offline_note: An offline participant gets no notifications and doesn't vote
remove_confirm: Remove this participant from the trip?
